title: selaginella velutina
intro: Selaginella velutina, also known as velvet spikemoss, is a type of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella velutina include reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and providing relief from respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea, powder, or supplement for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
